observation: Creator capsule routes now cover static surfaces, prompt DNA, motion storyboard, contact-sheet QA, social card, p5 creative-coding probes, Remotion timeline code, Manim explainer stubs, and TouchDesigner/twozero local-network handoffs. Creators still need a safe browser-demo route that produces a clickable local phenotype before any backend, hosting config, analytics, screenshot, or public deploy enters the workflow.
population: creator capsule frontier-adapter mutations for externally-rendered and browser-native visual workflows
selection_pressure: help a creator turn one capsule into a runnable or clickable artifact faster while preserving memory, proof, public boundary, rollback discipline, and minimal DASH core size

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a self-contained browser demo surface with local interaction smoke, browser proof, and deploy rollback boundary.
candidates.phenotype: JSON browser adapter contract plus fixed-canvas clickable HTML proof card and generated .artifacts smoke/QA notes
candidates.risk: Can become another static dashboard unless the HTML has a real local interaction path and the route blocks premature deploy, backend, analytics, screenshots, and network calls.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a small printable PDF zine for creator process notes.
candidates.phenotype: Multi-panel HTML/PDF proof using existing print path
candidates.risk: May duplicate the poster and one-pager paths unless a distinct remix need is proven.

candidates.mutation: Route the repo-local creator skill package into a reviewed external release checklist with install smoke, versioning, and rollback.
candidates.phenotype: Release contract and smoke script pending a reviewed registry target
candidates.risk: Could accidentally sync an unreviewed skill into live agents or publish private workflow assumptions.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff

retention: Retain creator-browser-demo-route as the public-safe bridge from capsule memory to a clickable local browser phenotype: JSON contract, self-contained HTML, generated ignored smoke/QA artifacts, fixed-canvas proof card, and machine gate. Keep older winners in retained_routes so the active candidate list stays focused on current mutations without losing regression coverage.
